scope: Equation-level Physical Quantum Qi v0.2 content

SK_FV_path_integral.Z_Qi_SKFV: Z_Qi[J_+,J_-] = ∫ Dq_+ Dq_- exp{iS_sys[q_+] - iS_sys[q_-] + iS_IF[q_+,q_-] + i∫(J_+q_+ - J_-)dt}
SK_FV_path_integral.S_IF: S_IF = ∫∫ Δq(t) D_R(t,t') Σq(t') dt dt' + (i/2)∫∫ Δq(t) N(t,t') Δq(t') dt dt'

SK_FV_Qi_action_v0_2A.barrier_floor_declared: V_barrier >= 1/2 Delta_gap ||Pi_perp q||^2 with Delta_gap >= 33/20 when MGAP4D floor is invoked
SK_FV_Qi_action_v0_2A.geometric_history_term_declared: field version includes ∫ q^* omega_Qi for operation-order residue

S_IF_kernel_conditions.SK_normalization_declared: S_IF[q,q]=0 and Z_Qi[J,J]=1 unless explicit leak/postselection normalization is declared

Markov_nonMarkov_boundary.memory_time_declared: tau_mem = ∫ tau ||D_R(tau)|| d tau / ∫ ||D_R(tau)|| d tau
Markov_nonMarkov_boundary.system_time_declared: tau_sys declared by Qi-system coarse-graining scale

current_and_ward_leak.Ward_leak_residual_zero: D_μ J_Qi^μ - L_leak - A_anom = 0 for open-system accounting

Ward_leak_identity_v0_2B.S_eff_declared: S_eff = S_sys[q;A] + S_IF[q_+,q_-;A] + S_boundary_Qi[X,B,A,delta_rel] + S_YM[A] + S_rel[delta,A]
Ward_leak_identity_v0_2B.CTP_branch_current_declared: <J_Qi^mu> = (1/(i sqrt(|g|))) delta log Z_Qi / delta A_Delta_mu | A_+=A_-=A
Ward_leak_identity_v0_2B.current_domain_declared: J_Qi lives on declared IndraNet gauge/current domain, not as arbitrary named flow

current_decomposition.J_boundary_declared: J_boundary^mu(x)=∫_{partial Sigma} chi(delta_rel) partial_tau X^mu delta(x-X(tau)) d tau
current_decomposition.J_rel_declared: J_rel^mu = delta S_rel / delta A_mu ~ G^{ij}(theta) delta_j D^mu delta_i

open_Ward_leak_identity.L_leak_declared: L_leak = L_env + L_partialB + L_membrane + L_coarse + L_measure
open_Ward_leak_identity.W_leak_residual_declared: W_leak = D_mu J_Qi^mu - L_leak - A_anom - R_res
open_Ward_leak_identity.W_leak_closure_rule: PhysicalQi/FullPathQi requires W_leak=0 within declared tolerance

leak_term_decomposition.L_env: exchange with traced-out environmental degrees of freedom
leak_term_decomposition.L_partialB: boundary flux through brane or membrane boundary: ∫_{partial B} n_mu J_Qi^mu dSigma
leak_term_decomposition.L_membrane: cross-layer leakage through a KuuOS membrane
leak_term_decomposition.L_coarse: loss induced by coarse-graining or RG projection
leak_term_decomposition.L_measure: measurement or intervention backaction from S_IF^measure

KuString_Qi_emergence.K_non_reification: K is not a Qi source and not a variational substance
KuString_Qi_emergence.chi_delta_rel: coupling weight measuring transportable condensation of dependent-origination difference
KuString_Qi_emergence.boundary_kernel_K_mu_a: K_μ^a(X,B) maps worldsheet boundary motion into brane-gauge components
KuString_Qi_emergence.S_eff: S_string + S_∂^Qi + S_brane + S_YM + S_open + S_rel
KuString_Qi_emergence.J_anom: explicit residue current from scope drift, translation distortion, membrane crossing, or holonomy

Qi_phase_ladder.PreQi: delta_rel in K_perp but no StringMode
Qi_phase_ladder.ProtoQi: StringMode exists but no brane-boundary gauge projection
Qi_phase_ladder.BoundaryQi: boundary coupling exists but no complete gauge-current definition
Qi_phase_ladder.TransportQi: A_mu and F_munu exist but J_Qi is not yet validated as variation of S_eff
Qi_phase_ladder.PhysicalQi: J_Qi = delta S_eff / delta A_mu and Ward/leak accounting closes with v0.2B
Qi_phase_ladder.FullPathQi: PhysicalQi plus SK/FV history, influence kernel, memory, noise, backaction, v0.2A action requirements, and v0.2B Ward/leak closure

PhysicalQi_emergence_criterion.criterion: PhysicalQi iff δ_rel∈K^⊥ ∧ δ_rel≠0 ∧ ∂Σ⊂B ∧ A_μ=Π_gauge(∂X,B,δ_rel) ∧ J_Qi^μ=δS_eff/δA_μ ∧ W_leak=0
